name: Iris Acquisition Corp II
business: Iris Acquisition Corp II is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or other similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any specific business combination target and has no operations. It intends to use proceeds from its initial public offering to effect a business combination.

exposures.sentence: These include: Technology, Media and Telecommunications (TMT) Business and IT Services Consumer Products and Digital Brands Hospitality and Real Estate Platforms Education and EdTech Logistics and Mobility Automotive and Industrial Technologies FinTech and Crypto
